title: 10 best herbal teas for pink eye
description: Yarrow teas helps with pink eye because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which effectively reduce redness and swelling in the affected area. The tea's antibacterial compounds also combat the underlying infection, clearing up discharge and promoting a rapid recovery. Additionally, yarrow's soothing effects help calm irritated eyes, reducing discomfort and itchiness associated with pink eye. As a natural remedy, herbal yarrow teas offer a gentle yet effective treatment option ...
